dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your RPM build configurations and sources.
dashboard.deleteError: Failed to delete project. Please try again.
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load projects. Is the backend running?

distributions.title: Target Distributions
distributions.description: Configure Linux distributions available for RPM builds.
distributions.name: Name

settings.adminOnlyDescription: Only administrators can access system settings.
settings.allowRegistrationHint: When disabled, only admins can create new accounts.

fileMapper.title: File Mapping
fileMapper.description: Map source files to their destination in the installed system.

project.name: Project Name
project.newProjectNamePlaceholder: Enter name for the new project

sourceBrowser.title: Source File Browser
sourceBrowser.description: Browse and select files from the remote server to include in your RPM build.

project.preFetchScriptHint: Script to run on the source server BEFORE files are fetched. Useful for creating a tar.gz archive, for example.
project.remoteCheckCommandHint: Shell command to run on the remote server (e.g. cat version.txt). Output can be used in dynamic RPM naming.
project.connectionChangeWarning: Changing connection settings may affect file mappings. After saving, you may need to re-select source files and update mappings.

notes.title: Project Notes
notes.placeholder: Write notes, documentation, or reminders for this project...

builds.title: Build #{{number}}
builds.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this build?

deployment.targetsDesc: Configure where your artifacts should be published.
deployment.selectBuildAlert: Please select a build to deploy.

specEditor.rpmNameHint: Only a-z, 0-9, hyphens ( - ), underscores ( _ ) and dots. No spaces or special characters. Leave empty to use the project name.
specEditor.rpmNameProjectInvalid: Project name contains invalid characters for RPM — set a valid RPM name above (only a-z, 0-9, - _ .)
specEditor.rpmNameValueInvalid: Invalid characters — only a-z, 0-9, hyphens ( - ), underscores ( _ ) and dots allowed.
specEditor.noDistrosSelected: Select at least one target distribution
specEditor.buildInfoDesc: The RPM Spec file defines how your package is built. Use standard RPM macros. The selected source files will be available in the build directory.
specEditor.extraVarsVersionHint: Use %(remote) and %(timestamp) as placeholders in the Version and Release fields above.
specEditor.useRawSpec: Use Spec File Without Modification (Raw Mode)
specEditor.useRawSpecHint: Enable this to use your Spec file exactly as-is. RPM Works will NOT inject %install or %files sections. Use this when you have your own complete Spec file with Source0: and %setup.

artifacts.title: Artifact Repository
artifacts.subtitle: Browse and download generated RPM packages.
artifacts.noArtifactsDesc: Build projects to generate RPM packages. They will appear here once completed successfully.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.subtitle: Manage remote servers for RPM package distribution.
repositories.basePathHint: Directory where RPMs will be uploaded.
repositories.noReposDesc: Add a remote server to enable automated deployment of your RPM packages.
repositories.name: Name
repositories.distributionPathsHint: Configure upload path per distribution. Leave empty to skip.
repositories.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this repository configuration?
repositories.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. RPM packages for System-900 retail

createProject.title: Create New Project
createProject.subtitle: Configure a new RPM build project from remote source.
createProject.connectedTo: Successfully connected to {{host}}. Verify the directory structure below.
